summary: Veda Healar - A premium spiritual numerology and Vedic healing website with cosmic design aesthetic, featuring numerology readings, name correction, Reiki healing, and business name analysis services. Includes Home, About, Services, Booking, Testimonials, and Contact pages with WhatsApp integration (7096912557) and Google Sheets booking form integration.
architectural_notes: Pure HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JS implementation with no frameworks
SEO optimized with proper meta tags
Clean folder structure with separated HTML, CSS, JS files
Google Sheets API integration for booking form submissions
known_issues: Navigation to other pages (About, Services, Booking, Testimonials, Contact) not working - multi-page routing broken

existing_features.title: Create a multi-page website structure with Home, About, Services, Book Consultation, Testimonials, and Contact pages using React Router for navigation

Implement premium cosmic spiritual design theme with deep blue (#0B1C2D), gold accent (#D4AF37), beige background (#F5F0E6), and white sections using Tailwind CSS. Use serif fonts for headings and sans-serif for body text. Include subtle mandala or energy glow background effects

Build Home page with hero section displaying headline 'Unlock Your Destiny with Vedic Wisdom', subtext describing spiritual guidance, CTA button 'Book Your Destiny Reading', services overview cards, about section intro, testimonials slider, and footer with disclaimer and social links

Create Services section with individual service cards for Numerology Reading, Name Correction, Lucky Number Selection, Reiki & Energy Healing, and Business Name Analysis. Each card must display a short description, starting price placeholder, and 'Book Now' button
Build booking form page with fields for Full Name, Email, Phone, Preferred Date, and Message. Implement client-side form validation and display success message upon submission
Add floating WhatsApp button that links to WhatsApp number 9096912557, positioned fixed on the screen
Implement sticky navigation bar with smooth scroll navigation and mobile hamburger menu that works across all breakpoints
Add scroll reveal animations and hover effects throughout the site for modern interactive experience
Create footer with address placeholder, email placeholder, WhatsApp link to 9096912557, and disclaimer text: 'All services are spiritual guidance based and not medical, legal or financial advice.'
Add payment integration placeholder structure ready for Razorpay or Stripe integration on the booking page
Ensure fully responsive mobile-first design that works seamlessly across all device sizes with fast loading performance
Fix multi-page routing so that navigation to About, Services, Book Consultation, Testimonials, and Contact pages works correctly from all navigation links and buttons throughout the site
Update WhatsApp button to use phone number 7096912557 instead of 9096912557

new_feature_requests.summary: Build complete multi-page website with Home, About, Services, Booking, Testimonials, and Contact pages
Implement cosmic spiritual design with deep blue, gold, and beige color scheme, mandala/energy glow backgrounds
Create service cards for numerology reading, name correction, lucky number selection, Reiki healing, and business name analysis
Build booking form with validation and Google Sheets integration (specified sheet URL)
Add WhatsApp floating button with number 9096912557
Implement responsive design with sticky navbar, smooth scrolling, hamburger menu, and scroll animations
Add payment integration placeholder (Razorpay/Stripe ready structure)
Integrate booking form submission with Google Sheets at URL https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cHx7IUpbe1T9QaHAmD2eI6IHLvPPWufnLEo6YbwpoiI/edit?gid=0#gid=0 to store form data

Configure booking form to submit data to Google Sheet at https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cHx7IUpbe1T9QaHAmD2eI6IHLvPPWufnLEo6YbwpoiI/edit?gid=0#gid=0, sending name, email, phone, date, service, and message fields
